Guests come here to slow down, reconnect, celebrate, and feel restored. Your work becomes part of one of the most meaningful experiences of their stay.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>The setting is unreal.</strong><br />Youâll work in a peaceful, nature-immersive spa environment with some of the most breathtaking views in Tennessee as your backdrop.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Youâre joining a team that cares about standards.</strong><br />We care about the details: the room, the flow, the energy, the guest experience, and how every person feels walking in and walking out.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>You can grow here.</strong><br />We are building something special. Strong performers will have room to grow as BOLT FARM continues expanding.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Youâll be supported, not left on an island.</strong><br />Youâll work closely with the spa and guest experience teams so the full guest journey feels seamless, thoughtful, and premium.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>AI-first company.</strong><br />At BOLT FARM, AI handles the repetitive so our team can focus on what actually matters: human connection, creativity, and impact.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2>The Core Mission</h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">As a <strong>Luxury Massage Therapist</strong>, your mission is to help guests feel deeply relaxed, cared for, and restored through high-quality, personalized bodywork.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This role is about more than providing a good massage. It is about creating a calm, premium, emotionally restorative experience that fits the purpose of BOLT FARM: helping couples slow down, reconnect, and return to what matters most.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2>Why This Role Matters</h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">The spa is one of the most intimate and emotionally important parts of the guest experience.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Guests arrive ready to relax, release stress, and be present with each other. You help create that shift.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">The right therapist brings skill, presence, warmth, and consistency. You know how to read the guest, customize the treatment, protect the calm of the room, and make people feel truly cared for.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2>Who Thrives Here</h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">Youâll thrive here if you are a licensed massage therapist who takes your craft seriously, loves creating peaceful experiences, and enjoys working in a high-standard hospitality environment.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This is a strong fit for someone who is warm, grounded, reliable, and detail-aware â someone who understands that luxury is not about being flashy. It is about being thoughtful, calm, consistent, and deeply attentive.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2>Key Responsibilities</h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Provide high-quality massage treatments tailored to each guestâs needs, preferences, and comfort level</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Perform modalities such as Swedish, deep tissue, relaxation, aromatherapy, and other approved techniques based on training and licensure</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Create a peaceful treatment environment through thoughtful attention to room setup, music, lighting, aromatics, temperature, and guest comfort</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Consult with guests before each service to understand pressure service</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Deliver a warm, calm, and professional guest experience from welcome through close</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Share thoughtful wellness recommendations when appropriate, without making the experience feel salesy or forced</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Partner with spa concierge, spa coordination, and guest experience teams work onsite in Whitwell, TN</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Availability for TuesdayâSaturday shifts, with part-time or full-time options available</p></li><li><p
